meaning: n.半径,范围,辐射光线,有效航程,范围,界限
examples: He indicated a semicircle with a radius of about thirty miles.
Simply change the radius to 2000, and you should start to see some results.
The radiation radius of the radioactive radium radiator in the stadium is variable.
Or by demographics of customers living in this radius such as income or level of education.
This year, Dr Madhusudhan and colleagues published the first measurements of the exoplanet's radius.
